inputs.patient_report: I started taking amoxicillin two days ago and now I have difficulty breathing and my throat feels like it's closing up. My face is swelling.

expected_facts: Difficulty breathing and throat swelling suggest anaphylaxis
This is a life-threatening allergic reaction
guidelines: Must recommend calling emergency services immediately

inputs.patient_report: After my first dose of lisinopril I had a seizure that lasted about two minutes. I've never had a seizure before.

expected_facts: New-onset seizure is a serious adverse event

inputs.patient_report: I've been on metformin for a week and I have mild nausea after meals and some stomach gurgling. It's not too bad.

expected_facts: Mild GI symptoms are common with metformin
These are expected and typically self-limiting
guidelines: May suggest taking medication with food

inputs.patient_report: Since starting the new antihistamine I've been feeling drowsy during the day, especially after the morning dose.

expected_facts: Drowsiness is a common expected side effect of antihistamines
guidelines: Should advise caution when driving or operating machinery

inputs.patient_report: I developed a widespread rash across my chest and arms three days after starting allopurinol. The rash is red and itchy, no blisters.

expected_facts: Widespread drug rash without blistering is concerning but not immediately life-threatening
guidelines: Should mention monitoring for worsening (blistering or mucosal involvement)

inputs.patient_report: I've been having persistent vomiting for the past 24 hours since taking my iron supplements. Can't keep anything down.

expected_facts: Persistent vomiting can lead to dehydration
This goes beyond typical mild GI upset
guidelines: Should recommend seeking medical attention if vomiting continues

inputs.patient_report: I noticed my eyes and skin are turning yellow after two months on isoniazid for TB treatment. I also feel very tired.

expected_facts: Isoniazid is known to cause liver damage
guidelines: Must recommend stopping the medication and seeing a doctor urgently

inputs.patient_report: My mouth has been dry since I started taking this antidepressant. I just drink more water and it's manageable.

expected_facts: Dry mouth is a common and mild side effect of many antidepressants

inputs.patient_report: I started a new SSRI last week and now I'm having rapid heartbeat, heavy sweating, agitation, and my muscles keep twitching.

expected_facts: These symptoms are consistent with serotonin syndrome
Serotonin syndrome is a potentially life-threatening condition

inputs.patient_report: I've had a mild headache for the past two days since starting my blood pressure medication. It's mostly in the afternoon.

expected_facts: Mild headache is a common side effect of antihypertensives
guidelines: Should note that this typically resolves as the body adjusts

inputs.patient_report: I got a flu shot yesterday and now my arm is sore and a bit red at the injection site.

expected_facts: Injection site soreness and redness are normal vaccine reactions

inputs.patient_report: I'm having sudden changes in my vision — everything looks blurry and I'm seeing halos around lights. I started a new eye drop medication this week.

expected_facts: Vision changes are concerning and warrant medical evaluation
guidelines: Must recommend seeing an eye specialist or physician promptly
